title: Brand Visual Design Guide Board AI
sourceTitle: Brand Visual Design Guide Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable brand visual design guide board with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable brand visual design guide board built around Luna Coffee, a specialty coffee. guide sections: logo, palette, typography, packaging, social card. composition: stable composition, modular information layout, clear hierarchy, readable sections, generous spacing, and a strong central visual. style: Premium information-design language with clean modules, readable hierarchy, restrained decoration, and collectible reference-board polish. color palette: cream, espresso black, copper controls the palette, accents, background, and supporting visual elements. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition, avoid real logos and replace brands with fictional or generic marks when publishing subject: Luna Coffee, a specialty coffee, as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
imagePrompts.title: Luna Coffee Specialty Coffee Cream Espresso Blac
